creator: johan@artcraft.se
text:
I have done some more research in this matter;

I did a fresh 6.2-RELEASE install - on the exact same hardware - just to
confirm that this isn't a hardware issue, but a code issue.

On the 6-2-RELEASE I got no issues at all, ati/radeon drivers worked
perfectly.

On 6-3-RELEASE I get the same errors as I get on 7.0-RELEASE.

So, this error applies on 7.0-RELEASE *and* 6.3-RELEASE - however works
fine on 6.2-RELEASE.

Regards,
Johan
